scope: all57 runtime physics where physics3.json exists

tier_guidance.v2_min: 2 groups: hair front/side/back merged plus breath/body secondary motion if the design has medium hair.
tier_guidance.v2_standard: 4-6 groups: front hair, side hair L/R, back hair, body/breath, accessory if present.
tier_guidance.v2_rich: 8+ groups: split hair strands, ribbons/accessories, skirt/clothing, bust/body, and effect-secondary motion when needed.
